tier_notes: Times of Lore is a Tier 3 (qualitative/empirical) entry. The available Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay description and design philosophy, with no quantitative movement or physics parameters documented. The game is an action RPG with overhead perspective, but specific mechanics like jump height, acceleration curves, gravity constants, or sub-pixel rendering systems are not detailed in accessible documentation. NES-specific technical details are unavailable.
